events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario. We are assessing torque & threaded fastening. Condition: torque-to-yield bolts reused (TRD/CC - one-time use). Work rough-complete. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Decision must fail because non-compliant and high/critical risk. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Findings: TTY bolts are single-use; reuse can cause clamp load loss, bolt failure. Actions: remove reused bolts, replace with new correct one-time-use fasteners per OEM spec, inspect mating components, re-torque/angle per spec, quarantine suspect batch, retrain. References: OEM engineering specs, maybe SAE J429? But reference says OEM/engineering specs. Need fill all fields. percent_complete maybe 80. value 0. confidence 1.0. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty, sound_source empty string. Need valid JSON only. Ensure no prose outside.

  "findings": [
    "Torque-to-yield (TTY) / tension-control (TRD/CC) bolts have been reused after being tightened past yield",
    "One-time-use fasteners show permanent elongation/necking and cannot reliably achieve specified clamp load",
    "Reused bolts violate OEM/engineering specification and create risk of joint loosening or fastener fracture"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work and quarantine the affected assembly/batch",
    "Remove all reused torque-to-yield bolts",
    "Inspect mating threads and clamped parts for damage or galling",
    "Install new, correct one-time-use TTY/TRD/CC fasteners per OEM spec",
    "Tighten to specified torque-plus-angle or tension-control procedure",
    "Document replacement and retrain personnel on single-use fastener policy"
  ],
  "rationale": "Torque-to-yield fasteners are engineered to be plastically deformed during first installation; reuse compromises clamp load and joint integrity, creating a critical safety/quality defect.",
  "references": ["OEM/engineering specs"]
}
